evidence_summary: [CH005_SC003] Purpose: Initiate the escalation and test the protagonist's resolve to escape.
[CH005_SC003] Summary: The protagonist decides to test the limits of his guard by attempting to leave the room, observing how the Watch Dog reacts to his movement.
[CH005_SC003] Coverage: Tracking shots following the protagonist. Point-of-view (POV) shots of the Watch Dog watching him. Handheld/unsteady shots to increase tension.
[CH005_SC003] Continuity: Distance between the protagonist and the beast, lighting transition from indoors to outdoors.
